default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Quarterly Business Review (QBR) to discuss GrowthX's content strategy performance and future plans for Rapyd](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New GrowthX-produced content is outperforming legacy Rapyd content](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Focus on refreshing high-potential older content and creating new targeted content for specific ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Exploring AI-optimized content strategies and LLM referral tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Need to integrate HubSpot data for better lead/conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [28 blog articles published in 22 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [New content showing stronger early performance than pre-GrowthX baseline](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Non-branded clicks and impressions increasing from March to August](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Legacy content from early-mid 2024 losing traffic steadily](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Refreshing high-potential pages from 2023-2024 that are losing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Optimizing content for AI search behavior (e.g., problem-solution framing, clear structure)](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Focusing on content recency to leverage AI's preference for recent information](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Consolidating similar pages to reduce overlap and improve conversion paths](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Industry Trends and Content Opportunities

  - [Cross-border FX cost mitigation: Potential to discuss stablecoin settlement benefits](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Payment rail evolution: Focus on academic/foundational content about crypto/stablecoin integration](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Retail trading expansion: Emphasis on prediction markets, overlap with gambling industry](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Targeting white-label brokerage platforms as potential referral partners](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### AI Search Optimization and Tracking

  - [Implementing LLM referral tracking through GA4](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Using Scrunch for brand presence monitoring in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Creating product-focused prompts for competitive analysis and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Optimizing content format for AI crawling (e.g., chunking information, FAQs, listicles)](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### ICP Refinement

  - [Discussed breaking down ICPs into more specific segments:](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
    1.  Mid-enterprise payment ops professional
    2.  Payfac/ISO (finance professionals, owners)
    3.  Physical retail (partners/ISOs or small business owners)
    4.  High-opportunity industries (gaming, online trading platforms)
  - [Potential to target ISVs separately, especially in high-opportunity verticals](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### HubSpot Integration

  - [Need to integrate HubSpot data for better lead and conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide requirements for HubSpot data integration into reports](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 30-minute deep dive on AI search strategies (week of August 25th)](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
  - [GrowthX to send HubSpot integration requirements for lead/conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2587.0)
  - [Develop prompts for AI visibility tracking, focusing on specific use cases and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Create content pillars for specific verticals/ICPs as foundational content is completed](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [Experiment with targeted content for white-label brokerage/gaming platforms](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Prioritize refreshing old, high-potential content in the 30-day plan](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Delay product page optimization due to larger structural considerations](https://fathom.video/share/uXpWPKy2amQyzyyKn5txJH1ya5HsLPHJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

action_items.description: Compile product-focused prompts for AI visibility tracking. Collaborate w/ Mark on use cases, pain points. Prep for next AI search discussion.
Review underperforming pages via new interface from Vivek. Provide go/no-go decisions + nuanced feedback on how to talk about topics in future.
Schedule 30min follow-up meeting re AI search w/ Mark, Nicolette, Kristen Reichel. Tue 8/25 @ 9:30am MT. Send calendar invite.
Send HubSpot integration requirements to Mark. Specify data needed + preferred reporting format for conversions/leads tracking.
